title: Section 75 Equality Screening Form for NIO Consultation: Proposed amendments to the Control of Explosives Precursors etc. Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2014
body: "A Section 75 Equality Screening Form for the Northern Ireland Office Consultation on proposed amendments to the Control of Explosives Precursors etc. Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2014.  The consultation can be found here. "
